_comment: Custom function definitions for the Retell voice + chat agents. In Retell, add two Custom Functions and use these name/description/parameters. Point each function's URL at your deployed booking backend, and add an Authorization header 'Bearer <BOOKING_WEBHOOK_SECRET>'. Both agents (voice + chat) share the same two functions.

functions.name: get_availability
functions.description: Check the candidate's real calendar for open interview slots in a date window. Call this when the user wants to book a meeting and after you have a preferred date range and timezone. Returns a list of open slot start-times to propose to the user. Never invent times — only propose what this returns.

start_date.description: Start of the window, ISO date e.g. 2026-06-10. Defaults to tomorrow if omitted.

end_date.description: End of the window, ISO date e.g. 2026-06-17. Defaults to 7 days after start.

timezone.description: IANA timezone, e.g. Asia/Kolkata or America/New_York. Ask the user if unsure.

functions.name: book_meeting
functions.description: Book a confirmed interview on the candidate's real calendar. Call this only after you have the user's full name, email, and a specific slot start-time they chose from get_availability. The backend re-verifies the slot is free before booking and emails a calendar invite. If it returns success:false with alternative slots, offer those instead.

slot_start.description: The exact slot start-time the user chose, ISO 8601, as returned by get_availability.

attendee_email.description: The user's email address for the calendar invite.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the booking, e.g. Asia/Kolkata.

notes.description: Optional: the meeting purpose or anything the user wants noted.
